violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and front prep was blocked by (cutting board and a mixer ). A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the dough mixer, prep table shelves, and stove hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (kitchen) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 09/02/2025
The (wall ) in the (bathroom ) area is in poor repair. Observed damaged dry wall and plumbing pipes. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2025
